title: junellia diversifolia
intro: Junellia diversifolia, also known as "sauce of the Andes," is a shrub native to the Andean region, belonging to the Verbenaceae family of plants. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Junellia diversifolia include relief from gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers, as well as its potential to treat wounds and reduce fever. Junellia diversifolia is traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the plant's leaves and stems being used for herbal remedies.
